facebook.caption: POV: you walked Đường Trần Hưng Đạo looking for coffee and almost missed Tarapaca Cafe. Don't be that person. 4.7 stars across 728 reviews on a street full of tourist traps. The locals already figured this one out. Add it to your Phu Quoc coffee run before the crowds catch on. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walked straight past it twice. Third time I went in. Tarapaca Cafe, 106A Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.7 stars, 728 reviews. Your morning sorted.
